code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{Col,Row}from"react-bootstrap";import BlogItem from"../blog-item/BlogItem.jsx";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BlogListPerTitle=()=>{const[title,setTitle]=useState("");const[postsArray,setPostsArray]=useState([]);const token=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('token'));const titleHandler=e=>{const lowerCaseRawTitle=e.target.value.toLowerCase();setTitle(lowerCaseRawTitle);};const getPostsPerTitle=async title=>{try{const rawData=await fetch("".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_BASE_BACKEND_URL,"/blogPosts?title=").concat(title),{headers:{"authorization":"bearer ".concat(token)}});const data=await rawData.json();setPostsArray(data.posts);return data;}catch(error){console.error(error);}};useEffect(()=>{getPostsPerTitle(title);},[title]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Row,{className:"mb-4",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Col,{className:"d-flex align-items-center gap-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"fs-5 m-0",children:"Immetti il Titolo del Post"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"TitleToSearch",onChange:titleHandler})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Row,{className:"row-cols-3",children:postsArray.map((post,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Col,{md:4,style:{marginBottom:50},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BlogItem,{...post},post.title)},"item-".concat(i)))})]});};export default BlogListPerTitle;
